goal: Implement core CLI with CLAUDE.md injection and PostToolUse hook
approach: Built full Rust CLI with 5 subcommands (setup, verify, why, log, status). setup patches ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md with marker-based injection and installs PostToolUse hook in settings.json. verify runs as hook and warns Claude when commits lack Intent: trailers. why follows git blame with history walking to find intents. All git ops shell out to git binary — no git2 dependency.

alternatives.rejected_because: Adds large native dependency, shelling out to git is simpler and more portable

alternatives.option: Store intent index in a JSON file
alternatives.rejected_because: Git trailers as index means zero merge conflicts and git itself is the source of truth
Rust gives single binary, fast CLI, brew-friendly distribution
